notifications.title: New Features
notifications.message:
Exam strategies are available.
Random, Domain specific, Repeat & Progress exam strategies help you more effectively prepare for exam session.
Let us know if any additional strategies are needed.

notifications.title: Should not show
notifications.message:
Configurable exam strategies will be added soon.
Hibernate feature is live - now if exam is in active session, when closing/opening app you will continue progress from the same state.
